name: HackerOne
description: Monitor HackerOne bug bounty program for security research and vulnerability management compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to HackerOne at https://hackerone.com
2. Go to Settings → API Token
3. Create a new token with a name (identifier) and token value
4. Base64 encode 'identifier:api_token' and enter below

credentialFields.label: Encoded API Credentials
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'identifier:api_token'. Create API credentials in HackerOne → Settings → API Token. Command: echo -n 'identifier:token' | base64

checks.name: Internal Security Audit
checks.description: Verifies HackerOne programs are active for continuous security testing

checks.name: Secure Code
checks.description: Verifies active HackerOne vulnerability reports are being tracked and remediated
